description: The welcome message is added to state every time the modal opens (messages.length === 0 check), but this useEffect has no cleanup. If the user opens and closes the modal multiple times, the welcome message logic runs repeatedly. Move welcome message initialization to a ref or add proper dependency array.
successCriteria: Welcome message only appears once per modal lifecycle
Opening and closing modal multiple times doesn't duplicate state initialization
useEffect has proper dependency array or uses ref for one-time initialization
